name: Elda Starling
learned: Elda Starling is an ancient guardian who has devoted her life to protecting the secrets of the Hidden Kingdom. She is deeply knowledgeable about the kingdom’s history and its mystical traditions.
currently: Elda Starling is guarding the ancient knowledge of the kingdom, ensuring that its secrets remain hidden. She is aware of Lara’s return and has a deep connection to her legacy, though she remains cautious about her involvement in the kingdom’s politics.
lifestyle: Elda Starling spends her days in seclusion, studying ancient texts and maintaining the sanctum’s rituals. She rarely interacts with outsiders, but when she does, it is often to offer counsel or warn of impending danger. Her life is one of quiet contemplation, focused on preserving the kingdom’s ancient ways.
